Spring Data MongoDB
  1. org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.messaging

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.messaging

Packages that use org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.messaging
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.messaging
MongoDB specific messaging support for listening to eg.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.messaging used by org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.messaging
    Class
    Description
    Cancelable
    Cancelable allows stopping long running tasks and freeing underlying resources.
    ChangeStreamRequest
    SubscriptionRequest implementation to be used for listening to Change Streams via a MessageListenerContainer using the synchronous MongoDB Java driver.
    ChangeStreamRequest.ChangeStreamRequestBuilder
    Builder for creating ChangeStreamRequest.
    ChangeStreamRequest.ChangeStreamRequestOptions
    SubscriptionRequest.RequestOptions implementation specific to a ChangeStreamRequest.
    Message
    General message abstraction for any type of Event / Message published by MongoDB server to the client.
    Message.MessageProperties
     
    Message.MessageProperties.MessagePropertiesBuilder
    Builder for Message.MessageProperties.
    MessageListener
    Listener interface to receive delivery of Messages.
    MessageListenerContainer
    Internal abstraction used by the framework representing a message listener container.
    Subscription
    The Subscription is the link between the SubscriptionRequest and the actual running Task.
    SubscriptionRequest
    The actual SubscriptionRequest sent to the MessageListenerContainer.
    SubscriptionRequest.RequestOptions
    Options for specifying the behaviour of the SubscriptionRequest.
    TailableCursorRequest
    SubscriptionRequest implementation to be used to listen to query results in a Capped Collection using a Tailable Cursor.
    TailableCursorRequest.TailableCursorRequestBuilder
    Builder for creating TailableCursorRequest.
    TailableCursorRequest.TailableCursorRequestOptions
    SubscriptionRequest.RequestOptions implementation specific to a TailableCursorRequest.
    TailableCursorRequest.TailableCursorRequestOptions.TailableCursorRequestOptionsBuilder
    Builder for creating TailableCursorRequest.TailableCursorRequestOptions.
    Task
    The actual Task to run within the MessageListenerContainer.
    Task.State
    The Task.State defining the lifecycle phase the actual Task.
